## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m compileall src`
- [ ] Docs only

If you did not run one of the checks above, explain why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept secrets, private data, and internal taxonomies out of this change.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples if the user-facing workflow changed.
- [ ] I described compatibility risk if behavior changed.
